title: Google Is Rolling Out a Video-Selfie Option If You Get Locked Out of Your Account
summary: Finding yourself locked out of your Google account for whatever reason is a stressful situation to be in—what with all your emails, documents, photos, and other data suddenly out of bounds—but there's now a new way to prove your identity and regain…
